'''''Wunt''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that operated during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was carrying mines when it was destroyed during [[Operation Blunt Stick]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
